scripts.dev:all: sh -c 'pnpm dev:api & api_pid=$!; pnpm dev -- --host 0.0.0.0; kill $api_pid'
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @agent-lab/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @agent-lab/agent-core typecheck && pnpm --filter @agent-lab/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @agent-lab/web typecheck
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @agent-lab/shared build && pnpm --filter @agent-lab/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @agent-lab/api build && pnpm --filter @agent-lab/web build
